NAVAREA XIX 21/14
1.RIGLIST. CORRECT AT 051830 UTC MARCH 14. 
   NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.
   
    72-24.2N 020-08.0E WEST HERCULES            
    66-14.1N 008-19.9E TRANSOCEAN SPITSBERGEN 
    72-20.1N 018-28.7E TRANSOCEAN BARENTS
    71-14.5N 022-15.1E SCARABEO 8    
    65-02.7N 006-56.6E DEEPSEA BERGEN
NOTES:
    A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
    B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I 
       WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
